original_prompt: Audit all 14 listed views for RTDB compatibility, correct event emission, and zero remaining Firestore usage.
rephrased_goal: Systematic audit of 14 view files to ensure correct RTDB 'subscribe' implementation and loading state management.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Audit all views for 'subscribe' and event emission.
Check-Pebble: Spot-check critical views (Dashboard, Appointments, Vans)
subtasks_required: Inspect loading state triggers in critical views
